entry.title: New: Bill 139 (Hawaiʻi County) — Passed Second Reading
entry.content:
AMENDS ORDINANCE NO. 25-45, AS AMENDED, THE OPERATING BUDGET OF THE COUNTY OF HAWAIʻI FOR THE FISCAL YEAR ENDING JUNE 30, 2026 Appropriates revenues in the Federal Grants – Benefits Enrollment Center – National Council on Aging account ($15

Latest action: Council: Bill 139 passes second & final reading - 04/22/26

View on the council site
